title: passiflora × rosea
intro: Passiflora × rosea is a hybrid species of passionflower, known for its vibrant pink flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which exhibit sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Passiflora × rosea include relieving anxiety and insomnia, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Passiflora × rosea can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
